summary: Completed testing of PlayXBets homepage redesign features. All requested features verified working correctly: filter tabs (Cricket, Live Cricket, Upcoming, Date picker), no Football tab, no Back/Lay columns on homepage, arrow icons for navigation, Min: 100 Max: 15L label, and bet-totals endpoint.

minor.issue: Matches from different leagues (IPL, PSL) are not perfectly sorted by date - some PSL matches appear after later IPL matches. Frontend handles sorting correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign complete. Filter tabs working (Cricket, Live Cricket, Upcoming, Date picker). No Football tab. No Back/Lay columns on homepage - only team names with chevron arrow for navigation. Match page shows Min: 100 Max: 15L label, Back (blue #1a56db) and Lay (dark red #991b1b) columns. Bet totals endpoint working at /api/match/{match_id}/bet-totals - returns home_total and away_total (currently 0 as no bets placed). Green bet totals only display when amount > 0.

homepage_filter_tabs.details: Cricket, Live Cricket, Upcoming, and Date picker tabs all present and functional

homepage_no_football_tab.details: Football tab correctly removed from homepage

homepage_no_back_lay_columns.details: Back/Lay columns removed from homepage - only team names with arrow icons

homepage_arrow_navigation.details: ChevronRight arrow icons present on match rows, clicking navigates to /match/{id}

homepage_live_filter.details: Live Cricket filter shows only live matches (0 currently live)

match_page_back_lay_columns.details: Back (blue) and Lay (dark red) columns present on match page

mobile_responsive_375px.details: Homepage and match page display correctly on 375px mobile viewport

desktop_responsive_1920px.details: Homepage shows clean list layout with chevron arrows on desktop

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/homepage_desktop_new.png - Desktop homepage with filter tabs and match list
.screenshots/match_odds_section.png - Match Odds section with Min/Max label
